problem id: 24b60af3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND SHL(5)) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01110111 -> 10101110
  10001111 -> 01110001
  01101011 -> 01001101
  01110101 -> 10101110
  01110100 -> 10001110
  01100110 -> 00001100
  10110100 -> 10010110

query: 00010001
predicted answer: 00000010
